call.longrepr:
entrypoint_argv = ['uv', 'run', 'circopt.py']
tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_check_parse_errors_have_l1')
case_id = 'literal_x'
content = '            input a\n            output y\n            y = X\n            '

    @pytest.mark.error
    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        ("case_id", "content"),
        [
            (
                "bad_syntax",
                """\
                input a b
                output y
                y = AND(a, b
                """,
            ),
            (
                "literal_x",
                """\
                input a
                output y
                y = X
                """,
            ),
            (
                "brackets",
                """\
                input a[0]
                output y
                y = a
                """,
            ),
        ],
    )
    def test_check_parse_errors_have_location(
        entrypoint_argv: list[str],
        tmp_path: Path,
        case_id: str,
        content: str,
    ) -> None:
        path = write_circ(tmp_path, f"{case_id}.circ", content)
        result, payload = run_json_command(
            entrypoint_argv,
            ["check", str(path), "--json"],
        )
>       assert result.returncode == 2
E       assert 3 == 2
E        +  where 3 = CompletedProcess(args=['uv', 'run', 'circopt.py', 'check', '/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_check_parse_errors_have_l1/literal_x.circ', '--json'], returncode=3, stdout='{"ok":false,"command":"check","exit_code":3,"error":{"type":"UndefinedNameError","message":"Undefined signal: X","file":"/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_check_parse_errors_have_l1/literal_x.circ","line":3,"col":null}}\n', stderr='').returncode
